Class SubConclusion

java.lang.Object
ca.mcscert.jpipe.model.elements.SubConclusion
All Implemented Interfaces:
CommonElement, ElementView, JustificationElement, StrategyBacked, SupportLeaf
public final class SubConclusion extends Object implements CommonElement, StrategyBacked, SupportLeaf
An intermediate conclusion within a justification.
